scripts.check:frontend: bun run lint && bun run --cwd packages/api build && bun run --cwd packages/slab-plugin-sdk build && bun run --cwd packages/slab-plugin-ui build && bun run --cwd packages/slab-desktop build
scripts.check: bun run check:frontend && bun run check:rust
scripts.build:app: cargo build --release -p slab-server && cargo build --release -p slab-runtime && bun run gen:plugin-packs && bun run --cwd bin/slab-app build
scripts.gen:schemas: cargo run -p slab-model-pack --bin generate_manifest_schema && cargo run -p slab-types --bin generate_settings_document_schema
scripts.lint: oxlint packages/api packages/slab-desktop packages/slab-components packages/slab-i18n packages/slab-plugin-sdk packages/slab-plugin-ui packages/vitest-rust-reporter plugins/video-subtitle-translator/src scripts
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --fix packages/api packages/slab-desktop packages/slab-components packages/slab-i18n packages/slab-plugin-sdk packages/slab-plugin-ui packages/vitest-rust-reporter plugins/video-subtitle-translator/src scripts
scripts.test: bun run test:frontend && bun run test:server && bun run test:rust
scripts.test:frontend: vitest run --project api --project plugin-sdk --project desktop --project desktop-browser --project components-browser
scripts.docs:dev: bun run gen:schemas && vitepress dev docs
scripts.docs:build: bun run gen:schemas && vitepress build docs
